I'll add an `ImageScaleBy` node to double the decoded video frames, then reconnect the video saver to use the upscaled output.
```batch
upscaled = ImageScaleBy(image=vaedecodetiled.image, upscale_method="lanczos", scale_by=2.0, near=vaedecodetiled)
vhs_videocombine.images = upscaled.IMAGE
done()
```
